title: athanasia humilis
intro: Athanasia humilis, also known as the Cape marigold, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its bright orange or yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Athanasia humilis include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and fight off infections. Athanasia humilis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
